title: The Flying Man: The Soul Knows Itself
description: Avicenna's thought experiment: if a man were created floating in the void, he would still know 'I am.'
introduction: Avicenna's thought experiment: if a man were created floating in the void, he would still know 'I am.'

translation.text: If a man were created all at once, floating freely in the air, he would be unaware of all things except the certain existence of himself.
